hero.subtitle: Thoughtfully designed living spaces made for new beginnings. No paperwork stress. No uncertainty. Just home.

vision.label: The Vision
vision.subtitle: To build thriving communities that bring together people starting new chapters, creating stability, growth, and a deep sense of belonging.
vision.noCreditDesc: No SCHUFA needed. We qualify based on future potential, not past paperwork.
vision.heardDesc: We speak your language. English-first contracts and 24/7 dedicated support.
vision.onePaymentDesc: Rent, high-speed WiFi, utilities, and furniture. One single monthly bill.
vision.noPaperworkDesc: Apply on your phone. Upload docs securely. Get approved in 24 hours.

journey.label: The Process
journey.exploreDesc: Browse our curated collection of community spaces designed for life wherever you choose to land.
journey.applyDesc: Complete a simple 10-minute application. No credit checks, no complicated paperwork.
journey.moveInDesc: Receive your keys and step into your fully furnished, ready-to-live space.
journey.thriveDesc: Join community events, build connections, and start your new chapter with ease.

whoWeServe.label: Who We Serve
whoWeServe.professionalsDesc: Made for moments of transition; when everything feels new.
whoWeServe.studentsDesc: Ideal living spaces for students pursuing their education abroad.
whoWeServe.azubisDesc: Comfortable housing for apprentices starting their careers.

faq.label: Need to Know
faq.q1: What is included in the monthly rent?
faq.a1: Everything you need to live comfortably. Your rent covers a fully furnished private suite, weekly cleaning, all utilities (high-speed WiFi, electricity, water, heating), and access to all community amenities and events.
faq.q2: How long are the lease terms?
faq.a2: We offer flexible living arrangements to suit your lifestyle. Memberships start at a minimum of 3 months, but most of our members choose to stay for 12 months or longer to fully immerse themselves in the community.
faq.a3: Yes, we love pets! Selected Arrivio properties offer pet-friendly floors and amenities. A small additional monthly fee may apply for deep cleaning services. Pet policies can vary by location, so please check directly with the property before booking.
faq.a4: Absolutely. One of the biggest perks of Arrivio is the ability to move seamlessly between our cities. As a member, you have priority access to transfer your lease to any of our other locations with just 30 days' notice.
faq.a5: We require a security deposit equivalent to one month's rent, which is fully refundable at the end of your stay, provided the space is returned in good condition.

locations.subtitle: Click on a city to preview the lifestyle. Find the vibe that fits your journey.
